obs: Attended Billie Eilish concert at Wells Fargo Center in Philadelphia with sister on 2023-03-18.
Considering PhD in education, focusing on educational leadership, policy, and urban schools. Interested in teacher evaluation and diversity/cultural responsiveness.
Attended niece's high school graduation ceremony on June 15th.
Completed watercolor piece as birthday gift for sister next month. Planning to frame with white/cream textured mat and wooden frame.
Owns oxfords, Adidas Superstars, and brown boots. Cleaned and polished Adidas Superstars on March 10th. Recently purchased new shoe cleaning kit.
Posted 15-second TikTok video of morning yoga routine; it got 100 views. Creating social media content calendar for yoga-themed posts.
Added Monday evening HIIT class to routine at studio near office. Interested in proper workout outfit and recovery techniques like foam rolling.
Located in downtown Manhattan zip code 10021. Looking for yoga studios; interested in Yoga to the People. Seeking 4-5mm thick eco-friendly, non-slip yoga mat.
Enjoys indie and alternative music. Attended free outdoor concert series in park and discovered live music in low-key settings. Interested in Mt. Joy.
Attended music festival in Brooklyn with group of friends featuring favorite indie bands. Saw Glass Animals perform live.
Enjoyed jazz night at local bar today. Bought saxophonist's album after live concert and listens to it regularly. Considering learning saxophone.
Planning trip to NYC. Interested in visiting Blue Note Jazz Club and Village Vanguard. Planning to attend Governors Ball Music Festival on Randall's Island this summer.
Planning LA trip in future. Interested in art museums and music venues. Enjoys Impressionist art; visited MoMA in NYC last month.
Trying to eat more plant-based meals. Interested in LA's vegan restaurants like Cafe Gratitude and M Cafe.
Planning Europe trip in July 2023, visiting London, Paris, and Rome. Visited San Francisco last November for conference.
Owns a Maltese dog. Struggling with nail trimming; plans to use Safari Professional Nail File. Looking for detangler products to prevent matting.
Interested in robotics applications in space exploration and advancement of scientific understanding.
Interested in gender roles in horror films and how they challenge or reinforce traditional stereotypes.
Uses natural all-purpose cleaner from health food store. Interested in Dr. Bronner's products for tough stains. Plans spring cleaning.
Amazon Prime member; saved $20 on shipping on four online orders totaling $150+. Starbucks Rewards Platinum member with 120 stars from 3 online orders of $20 each.

Established consistent writing habit. Wrote short story 'Lost in the Woods' during camping trip in early August using phone Notes app, transferred to laptop. Uses mechanical keyboard for better flow state and fewer typos.

Planning to start writing blog in next few weeks. Interested in themes: writing, creativity, productivity, writing-technology intersection. Inspired by 'The Write Practice' and 'ProBlogger' blogs. Following Ulysses writing app.
